title: Clash of the Titans
description: KNYSNA NEWS - On 19 May an epic competition...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - On 19 May an epic competition played out between two longstanding rivals - Team Knysna Rotary and Team Epilepsy SA South Cape/ Karoo Branch.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - On 19 May an epic competition played out between two longstanding rivals - Team Knysna Rotary and Team Epilepsy SA South Cape/ Karoo Branch."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These two parties have met annually for the last 15 years to play for the coveted Rotary/Epilepsy Cricket Floating Trophy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team Epilepsy arrived prepped and ready to do battle - hungry for a win after last year's surprise defeat.","html":"Team Epilepsy arrived prepped and ready to do battle - hungry for a win after last year's surprise defeat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unfortunately the same could not be said for Team Rotary, who appeared nonchalant and without a care in in the world. Alas, the single-mindedness and steely resolve of the opposition soon created uncertainty among the Rotarians.","html":"Unfortunately the same could not be said for Team Rotary, who appeared nonchalant and without a care in in the world. Alas, the single-mindedness and steely resolve of the opposition soon created uncertainty among the Rotarians."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Captain Mike Mills, fearing another annihilation, as had been the case in years gone by, rallied his troops, admonishing them for their laissez-faire attitude.","html":"Captain Mike Mills, fearing another annihilation, as had been the case in years gone by, rallied his troops, admonishing them for their laissez-faire attitude."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team Rotary players heeded this stern warning and started to focus, bowling with great accuracy, and scoring one run after the other.","html":"Team Rotary players heeded this stern warning and started to focus, bowling with great accuracy, and scoring one run after the other."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But to no avail, as the intrepid members of Team Epilepsy were simply too strong for the opposition.","html":"But to no avail, as the intrepid members of Team Epilepsy were simply too strong for the opposition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There was great jubilation in the Epilepsy ranks as the highly desired trophy was claimed once again.","html":"There was great jubilation in the Epilepsy ranks as the highly desired trophy was claimed once again."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As in battles lost and won, reconciliation and peace were declared and everyone sat down together to enjoy the traditional post-match boerie-rolls, salads and ice-cream."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With much handshaking, back-patting and a promise that the contest of 2024 would be one to be remembered, participants went home, dreaming of next year's win.","html":"With much handshaking, back-patting and a promise that the contest of 2024 would be one to be remembered, participants went home, dreaming of next year's win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The teams get together after the match.","html":"The teams get together after the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team Epilepsy celebrate.","html":"Team Epilepsy celebrate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
